languages.text: "На подходе к лагерю я слышал{mf||а} песню. Что это?"
"Colonel, I heard a song as I approached the camp. What was it?"
languages.original_text: "На подходе к лагерю я слышал{mf||а} песню. Что это?"

traits.locale_text: "Colonel, I caught the sound of a melody as I approached the camp. What was it?"
"Colonel, I caught the sound of a melody as I approached the camp. What was it?"
"Colonel, I heard a song before we met."
"Colonel, I caught the sound of a melody as I approached the camp. What was it?"
"Colonel, I caught the sound of a melody as I approached the camp. What was it?"
"Colonel, I heard a song as I approached the camp. What was it?"

languages.text: « Colonel, j'ai entendu le son d'une mélodie en approchant du camp. De quoi s'agit-il ? »
languages.original_text: "Colonel, I caught the sound of a melody as I approached the camp. What was it?"

traits.locale_text: « Colonel, j'ai entendu le son d'une mélodie en approchant du camp. De quoi s'agit-il ? »

languages.text: «Coronel, de camino al campamento pude oír una melodía. ¿Qué era?».
languages.original_text: "Colonel, I caught the sound of a melody as I approached the camp. What was it?"

traits.locale_text: «Coronel, de camino al campamento pude oír una melodía. ¿Qué era?».

languages.text: “上校，我进营地时听到了一段旋律。那是什么？”
languages.original_text: "Colonel, I caught the sound of a melody as I approached the camp. What was it?"

traits.locale_text: “上校，我进营地时听到了一段旋律。那是什么？”

languages.text: "Colonel, ich hörte eine Melodie, als ich mich dem Lager näherte. Was war das?"
languages.original_text: "Colonel, I caught the sound of a melody as I approached the camp. What was it?"

traits.locale_text: "Colonel, ich hörte eine Melodie, als ich mich dem Lager näherte. Was war das?"

languages.text: "Albay, kampa yaklaşırken bir melodi sesi işittim. Neydi o?"
languages.original_text: "Colonel, I caught the sound of a melody as I approached the camp. What was it?"

traits.locale_text: "Albay, kampa yaklaşırken bir melodi sesi işittim. Neydi o?"

languages.text: 「大佐、私達が出会う前に歌を聞いた」
languages.original_text: "Colonel, I heard a song before we met."
